narrative:
Fayette County has 16,763 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.2% of registrants.
